title: Divine Path
content:
This technique allow the cultivator to create an Avatar. The Avatar will help him breakthrough to Nascent Soul Stage. The only Drawback of the War God Shrine's Divine Path is the Avatar doesn't have cultivation and can only live 30 years. Wang Lin break the livespan drawback when he try to fuse the Avatar back to the Main Body, the Ji Realm conflict with the Avatar and remove the drawback.

The chant is very hard to remember and, most of the time, the disciples of the sect found it hard to even remember a word or a sentence.
